description: Stock and extended tokenized file schemas

extended_c2p1.name: Compiler 2 optional C2P1 package (not required for stock V2/V3.5)
extended_c2p1.description: Optional package envelope only. Stock BASIC V2 uses stock_basicv2; supported BASIC 3.5 uses Plus/4-compatible linked-line form. See DESIGN2.md §5.

notes.cgs1: CGS1 is reserved for Compressed GeoRAM Stream install sidecars only (docs/GEORAM_LOADER_DESIGN.md).
notes.stock_path: Primary LOAD/SAVE/VERIFY path is stock linked-line for V2 (C64) and stock-compatible 3.5 tokens (Plus/4). C2P1 is not required for those surfaces.
notes.classification: Prefer stock linked-line validation; optional C2P1 only for Compiler 2-only package features.
